title: Lite rain
description: a simple pack that decrease rain particles and make transparent!
body:
# 🌫️🌦️ Lite Rain

An ultra-clean version of **Vibrant Rain** for players who want maximum visibility while still keeping the feeling of rain.

### ✨ Features

* Extremely transparent rain
* Reduced rain particles
* Minimal visual distraction
* Clean and lightweight look

Perfect for PvP, building, or players who prefer a clearer screen.



## 🧠 Why use this?

Default rain can feel heavy and block your view. This pack keeps the atmosphere while making rain lighter, smoother, and more cinematic.



## 📦 Modpack Usage

You are free to include this resource pack in any modpack, whether hosted on Modrinth, CurseForge, or other platforms. No explicit permission is required, though credit is always appreciated!



**Made by Duro_85😎**

[original version](https://modrinth.com/project/s8xUPE4Z)
